parameters.query:
=WITH skills_jeune AS (
  SELECT sk.skill_name as skill
  FROM jeunes j
  INNER JOIN koda_inference_skills sk
    ON (sk.source_type = 'classe' AND sk.source_value = j.classe)
    OR (sk.source_type = 'secteur' AND sk.source_value = j.secteur_vise)
  WHERE j.airtable_id = '{{ $json.airtable_id }}'
  UNION
  SELECT sk.skill_name as skill
  FROM jeunes j
  INNER JOIN koda_inference_skills sk
    ON sk.source_type = 'situation' AND sk.source_value = 'MNA'
  WHERE j.mna = true AND j.airtable_id = '{{ $json.airtable_id }}'
)
SELECT
  j.airtable_id, j.prenom, j.codes_rome_suggeres, j.departement, j.ville,
  j.niveau_francais_declare, j.classe, j.disponibilite, j.secteurs_interet,
  j.besoins, j.attentes_mentor, j.mna, j.secteur_vise,
  COALESCE((SELECT STRING_AGG(DISTINCT s.skill, ', ') FROM skills_jeune s), '') AS skills_inferees
FROM jeunes j
WHERE j.airtable_id = '{{ $json.airtable_id }}'
LIMIT 1;
SELECT rome_source, rome_cible, type_passerelle as type FROM koda_rome_passerelles
